query: SELECT messageType, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NULL OR content = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_content FROM crm_messages GROUP BY messageType ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT messageType, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NULL OR content = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_content FROM crm_messages GROUP BY messageType ORDER BY cnt DESC;
